note: Curated index of permissively-licensed public MCP servers and AI agents runnable via `xelian add`. Xelian does not host this code — it links to and runs each project under its own license (MIT/Apache-2.0/BSD/ISC/MPL-2.0), with attribution. Ranked by trusted-source then stars; spam/star-farmed and non-runnable (lists, tutorials) entries filtered out. Runnability of each entry is determined at `xelian add` time.

It turns manual steps, tool calls, LLM calls, structured logs, failures, durations, and run metadata into readable execution trees you can inspect from the terminal.  It is built for TypeScript/Node.js developers..
